name: How to add your business to NextDoor
description: Adding your business to NextDoor is a great way to reach out to your local community and promote your business. This guide will show you how to add your business to NextDoor and get the most out of this powerful marketing tool.
main_title: How to add your business to NextDoor | Synup
richtext:
A social networking platform with a hyperlocal approach, Nextdoor focuses on the neighborhood business as an essential part of any community. Therefore, Nextdoor’s Business Pages are geared specifically to “businesses that are truly local.”

‍

If your company offers products or provide services to the community in which it operates, a Nextdoor Business Page can be a great way to reach out to your target consumer base. An effective presence on Nextdoor allows community members to discover your business with ease. And, after you connect with them, you can use the Nextdoor platform to guide them to your door through a strategic marketing and customer service campaign of advertisements, posts, and direct messages.

‍

But, of course, you can’t capitalize on the many benefits that Nextdoor has to offer if you don’t feature your business on it. Get started today by claiming a Nextdoor Business Page free of charge.

‍

You can claim your Nextdoor Business Page in one of two ways. Do you already have a personal Nextdoor account? Then you can simply add a Business Page to this account. By linking your personal Nextdoor account with your Nextdoor Business Page, you can toggle between them with a single click. To add a Business Page your existing account, follow these three steps:

‍

Step 1: Log in to your Nextdoor account online or through the Nextdoor app.

‍

Step 2: Click or tap on your neighbor profile photo.

‍

Step 3: Click or tap on “Add Business Page.” 

‍

If you don’t have a personal Nextdoor account and don’t want to get one, you can create an independent business account to establish your Nextdoor Business Page. Even if you already have a personal Nextdoor account, you may choose to keep that account separate from your Business Page for a variety of reasons. To create an independent Nextdoor business account, begin by following these three steps:

‍

Step 1: Navigate to the Nextdoor “Create a business account” page online.

 

Step 2: Fill out all required data fields beginning with name, email address, and password generation.

‍

Step 3: Log into your new account and click or tap on “Add Business Page.” 

‍

After establishing Nextdoor Business Page, you are ready to set it up. Navigate to the “Page” tab and click or tap on “Edit.” This will allow you to do everything from adding a business logo to building a photo gallery.

‍
